settings.title: Telephone
settings.subtext: Please call or text us for faster responses. Please include or have your order number available if you are inquiring about an existing order.

settings.title: Response Times
settings.text: We typically reply to emails within 1–2 business days, and often sooner during normal volume periods. We handle every inquiry personally.

settings.title: Fragrance Guidance
settings.text: Not sure where to start? Tell us what scent profiles you already love and we can suggest beautifully matching custom options from our massive library.

settings.caption: Concierge Support
settings.heading: We're here to help.
settings.text: Whether you need support with custom candles, wax melts, or subscriptions, our team is standing by to ensure your experience is perfect.
settings.form_text: Fill out the form below to reach our support team directly via email.
